title: rubus borderi
intro: Rubus borderi, also known as the Border Black Raspberry or Bramble, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family that produces edible black raspberries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus borderi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus borderi can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
